---
title: "William Francis Cowper-Temple, 1st Lord Mount Temp"
---

## William Francis Cowper-Temple, 1st Lord Mount Temp

**Dates:** (1811-1888)

### Description

politician

### Biography

He married (1848) Georgiana Tollemache; he offered to introduce CMY to De Kuyper. He was created a peer in 1880;   he lived at Broadlands, near Romsey. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 8th [?1880-1888]
- Letter from June 21 [1874]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
